LanguageData.MF_Flavor_Start_0: a lineage with distinct signs of external intervention. The physical structure of these beings is entirely dictated by the specifics of their origin.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_Start_1: stands out from base forms due to its unusual physiology. Traces of deep biological restructuring are visible in their appearance.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_Start_2: beings whose appearance directly reflects their genetic history. Every detail of their body is subject to the internal logic of the species' development.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_Start_3: indicate their complete adaptation to their niche. Their appearance is devoid of accidental traits, being the result of long selection.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_Start_4: differ significantly from standard individuals. Their proportions and tissue structure follow an altered genetic blueprint.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_Start_5: a specialized branch whose appearance immediately distinguishes them from others. The biology of these beings was fine-tuned for specific tasks.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_Start_6: the result of a consistent modification of the original foundation. In their appearance, functionality completely prevails over aesthetics.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_Start_7: possess a characteristic set of external features. Their physical type was shaped under the influence of factors that altered their nature.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_Start_8: give the impression of beings whose organism has undergone a complete revision. Their entire appearance points to a departure from primary standards.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_Start_9: a group with a unique morphology. Their physical "self" is shaped under the influence of a specific and complex code.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_Start_10: unique in a combination of traits that are rarely found together in such an order.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_Start_11: bear clear imprints of different lineages, creating a truly original image.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_Start_12: represent a living example of how the most diverse external features can intertwine.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_Start_13: part of a complex mosaic assembled from the heritage of different ancestors.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_Start_14: stand out precisely because of how characteristics taken from different sides coexist within them.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_Start_15: possess a recognizable yet completely non-standard set of external characteristics.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_Start_16: another reminder of the complexity and richness of biology.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_Start_17: is the result of an accidental or intentional combination of different visual markers.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_Start_18: cannot be fitted to any single standard due to the abundance of mixed traits.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_Start_19: possess an appearance that emphasizes their intermediate position between familiar types.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_Connect_0: Their nervous system and sensory organs have specific settings. This leaves its mark on their perception of the world and daily habits.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_Connect_1: Internal processes in their bodies flow at a special rhythm. Such biology makes their organism extremely sensitive to the stability of internal balance.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_Connect_2: The way the organism interacts with external stimuli is unique. This is due to a deep restructuring of all basic life-support systems.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_Connect_3: The metabolism of this branch functions in a specific mode. This makes their life cycles directly dependent on certain biological factors.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_Connect_4: The internal chemistry of these beings has been subjected to serious adjustment. This is reflected in their general condition and ways of responding to the environment.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_Connect_5: Energy distribution in their bodies follows different rules than standard species. Such a structure requires a special resource recovery regime.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_Connect_6: Organs and tissues possess specific properties embedded at the code level. This makes their biology complex and requiring constant attention.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_Connect_7: The life cycle of this lineage has its own characteristic features. All body systems work according to internal settings written in the genome.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_Connect_8: The organism uses specific mechanisms to maintain life. This has led to the emergence of a unique set of internal needs.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_Connect_9: The internal structure of these beings is subject to the principle of narrow specialization. Any change in metabolism is immediately reflected in their condition.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_Connect_10: Such a combination of characteristics creates a unique internal balance inherent only to this specific lineage.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_Connect_11: The interaction of different traits within a single organism has made their nature unlike the parental foundations.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_Connect_12: Their entire set of features works as a unified system, despite the different origins of individual traits.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_Connect_13: Even minor changes in their code have led to them being perceived as something completely new.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_Connect_14: Their nature is a fragile or, conversely, successful balance between what they inherited from different sides.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_Connect_15: The mixing of foundations has led to the emergence of an individual set of needs and internal qualities.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_Connect_16: The internal structure of these beings now follows its own logic, dictated by this union.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_Connect_17: Every trait they adopted became part of their new, individual biological history.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_Connect_18: Their organism adapted to this set of traits, turning them into a stable personal feature.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_Connect_19: This combination of genes has made their existence separate from the rules by which their ancestors live.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_End_0: Due to their biological distinctness, they often face social distance. The attitude toward them from other groups is rarely unambiguous.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_End_1: In most worlds, they are valued for their unique qualities but rarely accepted into the mainstream. They remain a group living by its own laws.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_End_2: The presence of these beings often causes wariness in others. Unusual appearance and habits become the cause of misunderstanding by neighbors.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_End_3: For many, they remain merely a living result of code manipulation. Such status leaves its mark on their relationships with other species.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_End_4: They occupy a niche where their features become a key factor. Despite this, their lives often pass in relative isolation.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_End_5: The reputation of this lineage is built on a mixture of facts and speculation. Few dare to ignore their presence, knowing their specific nature.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_End_6: The history of this branch is full of evidence of their difficult path. In many cultures, they are viewed as an example of how plastic the living essence is.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_End_7: They rarely fit into standard social structures. Their lifestyle is dictated by biology, which requires a special attitude toward their needs.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_End_8: They are treated as necessary but extremely specific members of communities. Their capabilities arouse interest, but their nature remains a mystery.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_End_9: In the eyes of most, they are living proof of the deep changes sweeping the sector. They continue their journey, relying on their unique identity.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_End_10: Ultimately, they remain themselves — a unique result that cannot be repeated twice.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_End_11: It is precisely this mixture of traits that makes them noticeable in any society, standing out from the mass of familiar types.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_End_12: One way or another, they take their place in the world as completely independent and original individuals.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_End_13: To others, they will forever remain a mystery that cannot be fully solved through their origin.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_End_14: Their path is a story of how something absolutely unpredictable can arise from familiar elements.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_End_15: In the eyes of the world, they are living proof that any combination of traits has a right to exist.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_End_16: Despite all questions about their origin, they continue to live by their own standards.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_End_17: Their place in the general order of things is determined by this very uniqueness they carry within.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_End_18: In the end, they are not just a sum of traits, but something more, possessing its own face.
LanguageData.MF_Flavor_End_19: For this reason, they have finally secured the status of beings whose individuality stands above any classifications.
